normalization.notes: Store encoded Ugaritic signs and word dividers in NFC while preserving transliteration with aleph and ayin distinctions. Do not infer vowels beyond reviewed transliteration policy.

segmentation.pedagogical_units: Ugaritic alphabetic cuneiform signs, aleph variants, emphatics, word divider, and transliteration labels
segmentation.notes: Ugaritic is alphabetic but historically and culturally bound to tablet corpora. Sign values, divine names, and unvowelized forms need specialist review before learner-facing copy.
